name: Spotted Handfish
conservationEfforts: CSIRO recovery program. Invasive seastar (Asterias amurensis) removal. Captive breeding at CSIRO Marine Laboratories. Artificial spawning habitat deployed.
description: One of the world's most unusual fish, the spotted handfish 'walks' on the sea floor using its modified pectoral fins. Found only in the Derwent Estuary, Tasmania.
